Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Continued To Sep-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Heffner for and with Yew Thien Ng. Steven Booska for and with Cecilia Ng. Wilbur McMinn also for Cecilia Ng.

Mr. Heffner stated that they were working on the settlement framework, that they were trying to get a number out of the other side, but the only figure the other side had given them was the original amount which would be the amount if they prevailed. Mr. Booska stated that they had given Mr. Heffner an amount a couple of weeks ago. Mr. Heffner stated that there had been some issues in getting the number. Discussions regarding the joint tenancy were held. The Court stated that it doesn't help the possibility of settlement if the number given is the top amount. The Court then directed counsel to submit an amount to Mr. Heffner that he could work with, and continued the matters to September 1, 2009. Mr. Heffner stated that he wanted to pursue settlement in good faith. Mr. McMinn stated that there was no issue as to the Co-Administrators and addressed the Examiner's notes as set forth on the record. The Court stated that it had hoped to see everyone on the first with a settlement.

Judge: Raymond J. Arata Jr. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
